items.name: Golden Tengu, Japanese traditional mask
items.description:
✨ ✨ LIMITED EDITION ✨ ✨ 
🔴 Other variations:

White Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/124507370440659

Black Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/76162011454800/

Red Tengu, Japanese traditional mask:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/83744288875009

The red Tengu mask with its long, bulbous nose and stern expression is one of the most distinctive of all traditional Japanese masks. 
This wooden, reddish-brown mask is deeply connected to Japanese folklore, representing the mythical Tengu, a bird-like creature. 
These beings, known as 「天狗  •（てんぐ  •  Tengu）」, are often associated with their mystical abilities and are seen as protectors of the mountains and forests. 

Made by wyssion
All rights reserved.

More from Aluvion UGC: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Category=1&CreatorName=Aluvion+UGC&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3&IncludeNotForSale

items.name: White Tie-Front Crop Top with Black accents Robin
items.description: Upgrade your Roblox avatar's fashion game with the Robin White Tie-Front Crop Top with Black Accents, a top-rated virtual clothing item on Roblox Marketplace. This stylish crop top is designed for trendsetters who want their avatar to stand out. Featuring a crisp white base, eye-catching black neckline and sleeve trim, and a playful front tie knot, this versatile top is perfect for casual wear or fashion-forward roleplay outfits. Crafted for a perfect fit on Roblox avatars, it ensures both style and comfort. Pair it effortlessly with cargo pants, ripped jeans, or a chic skirt to create iconic Roblox looks. Robin Clothing is a leading brand in virtual fashion, recognized for quality and originality on Roblox Marketplace. Make your mark in virtual hangouts, gaming adventures, or digital runway shows.
